hero.eyebrow: AI IMPLEMENTATION AGENCY — PUERTO RICO & ORLANDO
hero.headline: We Find Where You're Losing Clients.
hero.subheadline: ThunderHouse audits your intake, follow-up, and operations — then builds AI systems to close every gap. We work specifically with doctors, attorneys, and CPAs.

leaks.headline: Most businesses are losing clients in 4 places.
leaks.subheadline: We run a diagnostic audit to find exactly which ones — then we build systems to close them.

leak1.name: Visibility Leak
leak1.body: Potential clients can't find you — or don't trust what they see. Google Business Profile gaps, weak local SEO, and inconsistent online presence cost you before anyone contacts you.

leak2.name: Conversion Leak
leak2.body: People find you but don't contact you. Confusing website copy, unclear next steps, or a booking process that asks too much too soon. Leads visit and leave.

leak3.name: Response Leak
leak3.body: Leads come in but don't get followed up fast enough. Missed calls, slow email replies, no SMS automation — your competitor answers first.

leak4.name: Operations Leak
leak4.body: You're getting clients but staff is overwhelmed with manual intake, paperwork, reminders, and handoffs. Errors compound. Clients feel the friction.

services.headline: AI systems for the three biggest bottlenecks
services.subheadline: Every system we build reduces manual work, speeds up response, and helps you serve more clients without adding staff.
services.not_sure: Not sure what you need? The audit tells you.

intake.name: CLIENT INTAKE AUTOMATION
intake.tagline: Capture every lead. Convert more of them.
intake.hero_headline: Stop Losing Clients to a Broken Intake Process
intake.hero_sub: We build AI-powered intake systems that capture inquiries, collect documents, and route leads automatically — so nothing falls through the cracks.
intake.problem_body: Most professional service businesses lose 20–40% of their leads at the intake stage. The inquiry comes in — by phone, web form, or social media — and then nothing happens fast enough. The lead goes cold. Or worse, a competitor responds first.
solution_items: Intelligent intake forms that ask the right questions and qualify leads automatically
Automated routing that sends inquiries to the right person or queue instantly
Scheduling flows that let prospects book without back-and-forth coordination
Document collection workflows that gather what you need before the first meeting
intake.workflow_body: A prospect fills out your form or calls your number. Within seconds, they receive a confirmation message, a calendar link, or a document request — depending on what stage they're in. Your team sees a qualified, organized lead. No manual work required.

followup.name: AI FOLLOW-UP SYSTEMS
followup.tagline: Never let a lead go cold again.
followup.hero_headline: Your Follow-Up Should Never Depend on a Human Remembering
followup.hero_sub: We build automated follow-up systems that respond instantly, remind persistently, and re-engage leads — in English and Spanish.
followup.problem_body: The window to convert a lead is short. Research consistently shows that response time is one of the biggest factors in whether a lead converts. Most professional service businesses have no automated follow-up — which means leads that aren't immediately called back are effectively lost.
solution_items: Instant SMS or email responses when a lead submits a form or misses a call
Multi-step follow-up sequences that keep leads warm over 3–7 days
Appointment reminder systems that reduce no-shows via SMS, WhatsApp, and email
After-hours AI chat that captures inquiries and qualifies leads while you sleep
followup.workflow_body: A lead submits a form at 8 PM. Within 60 seconds, they get a personalized SMS response and a calendar link. Over the next 3 days, they receive two more follow-up messages if they haven't booked. Meanwhile, your Calendly is clean, your team gets a notification for confirmed appointments only, and no one chased the lead manually.

operations.name: OPERATIONS AUTOMATION
operations.hero_headline: Your Team Should Be Serving Clients, Not Managing Systems
operations.hero_sub: We automate the repetitive operational work — data entry, handoffs, reminders, reporting — so your team focuses on what only humans can do.
operations.problem_body: In most professional service practices, staff spend 2–4 hours per day on work that doesn't require human judgment: entering data, sending reminders, coordinating handoffs, updating spreadsheets. This isn't just inefficient — it's a direct limit on how many clients you can serve.
solution_items: Workflow automation that connects your intake, CRM, and scheduling tools automatically
Task handoff systems that alert the right person at the right moment without manual coordination
Data integration that eliminates re-entry between systems
Automated reporting dashboards that show you what matters without manual assembly
operations.workflow_body: We map your current manual workflows, identify the highest-impact automation opportunities, and build systems that handle the repetitive steps automatically. Your team gets notified only when a human decision is required — everything else happens without them.

overview.headline: All our services, in one place
overview.sub: Three service areas. One goal: your practice serving more clients with less manual effort.

industries.headline: We specialize in professional service practices
industries.subheadline: We focus on three industries because their intake and operations challenges are ones we know how to solve.

doctors.name: Medical Practices
doctors.tagline: Patient intake, appointment reminders, and follow-up — automated.
doctors.cta: See How It Works for Medical Practices →
doctors.hero_headline: Your Patients Deserve a Faster, Smoother Intake Experience
doctors.hero_sub: We build AI-powered systems for medical practices that handle inquiries, send reminders, and collect patient information — reducing staff workload and improving the patient experience.
doctors.pain1_body: Calls that go to voicemail, website forms that no one follows up on, after-hours messages with no response. Every missed inquiry is a patient who called your competitor.
doctors.pain2_body: Staff spending hours calling patients to confirm appointments. No-shows that could have been prevented with automated SMS or WhatsApp reminders sent 48 and 24 hours before.
doctors.pain3_body: Patients fill out paper forms in the waiting room or email PDFs back and forth. The same information gets manually re-entered into your system. Errors happen. Staff time is wasted.
doctors.pain4_body: Your front desk handles phones, scheduling, insurance verification, reminders, and patient questions — all at once. Automation lets them focus on the patients in front of them.
doctors.cta_headline: Ready to automate your patient intake?
doctors.cta_sub: Start with a free audit of your current process.

attorneys.name: Law Firms
attorneys.tagline: Lead intake, consultation scheduling, and document collection — systematized.
attorneys.cta: See How It Works for Law Firms →
attorneys.hero_headline: Your Next Client Shouldn't Have to Wait Two Days for a Response
attorneys.hero_sub: We build AI-powered intake systems for law firms that capture leads instantly, schedule consultations automatically, and collect documents without back-and-forth emails.
attorneys.pain1_title: Leads That Never Get Followed Up
attorneys.pain1_body: Someone fills out your contact form at 9 PM on a Friday. By Monday morning, they've already hired someone else. Automated follow-up responds instantly — even after hours.
attorneys.pain2_body: Coordinators manually compare calendars, send email options, wait for replies, confirm, and repeat. A smart scheduling flow handles this in minutes — no staff time required.
attorneys.pain3_body: Chasing clients for retainer agreements, intake documents, and case information via email is slow and error-prone. Automated document collection workflows move cases forward without manual follow-up.
attorneys.pain4_body: When a potential client calls and goes to voicemail, most don't leave a message — they call the next attorney. AI-powered missed call response texts them back instantly.
attorneys.cta_headline: Ready to systematize your client intake?
attorneys.cta_sub: Start with a free audit of your current process.

cpas.name: CPA Firms
cpas.tagline: Client reminders, document collection, and deadline management — automated.
cpas.cta: See How It Works for CPA Firms →
cpas.hero_sub: We build AI-powered systems for CPA firms that automate document requests, deadline reminders, and client communication — so your team focuses on the actual accounting work.
cpas.pain1_body: Every tax season, your staff spends weeks following up with clients who haven't sent their documents. Automated reminder workflows send the right message at the right time — and track who responded.
cpas.pain2_body: Clients miss deadlines because they weren't reminded at the right moment. Automated workflows send timely reminders via SMS and email — reducing extensions and late filings.
cpas.pain3_body: New client onboarding involves forms, document requests, engagement letters, and back-and-forth emails. An automated onboarding flow collects everything and confirms it without manual coordination.
cpas.pain4_body: Clients don't know where their return is. They call or email for status updates, pulling your team away from actual work. Automated status updates keep clients informed without manual effort.
cpas.cta_headline: Ready to automate your client communication?
cpas.cta_sub: Start with a free audit of your current process.

audit.headline: Free AI Client Acquisition Audit
audit.subheadline: We review your intake, follow-up, and operational workflows — then give you a clear diagnosis of where you're losing clients and what AI systems would fix it.
audit.no_pitch: No pitch. No commitment. Just a real diagnosis.
audit.check1_body: How are you capturing leads from your website, phone, and social media? How fast does someone get a response? What happens if they reach out after hours?
audit.check2_body: What happens after someone contacts you? Is there an automated sequence, or does it depend on staff remembering to follow up? How many leads go cold?
audit.check3_body: How easy is it to book a consultation or appointment? How are reminders handled? What's your no-show rate, and is anyone tracking it?
audit.check4_body: Where is your team spending the most manual time? Document collection, data entry, reminders, handoffs — we identify what can be automated and what the time savings would be.
audit.check5_body: Is your Google Business Profile complete and optimized? Are you appearing in local searches for your practice area? How does your website convert visitors to contacts?
audit.get1: A written summary of what we found
audit.get2: Specific gaps identified in your intake and follow-up
audit.get3: A prioritized list of AI systems that would close those gaps
audit.get4: Realistic estimates of time and cost for implementation
audit.get5: No obligation — you decide if and when to move forward
audit.who_its_for_body: This audit is designed for medical practices, law firms, and CPA firms in Puerto Rico and the U.S. that are serious about growing their client base and reducing manual operational work. If your team is still making manual reminder calls, chasing documents by email, or missing leads from after-hours inquiries — this audit will show you exactly what to fix.
audit.cta_subheadline: Available in English and Spanish. No sales pressure.
audit.faq1_a: Yes. The audit is completely free with no obligation. We conduct it via a 30-minute video call and follow up with a written summary within 2 business days.
audit.faq2_q: How long does the audit take?
audit.faq2_a: The discovery call is 30 minutes. We send you the written summary within 2 business days.
audit.faq3_a: You receive a written diagnosis and a prioritized recommendation. If you want to move forward with implementation, we'll propose a project. If not, you keep the findings.
audit.faq4_q: Do I need to be tech-savvy?
audit.faq4_a: No. We explain everything in plain language. You don't need to understand the technology — you just need to know your business.
audit.faq5_q: Do you work with businesses outside Puerto Rico?
audit.faq5_a: Yes. We work with Puerto Rican businesses in Puerto Rico and Orlando, and we take select clients in other U.S. markets on a case-by-case basis.

process.headline: From audit to automated — five clear steps

step1.title: AUDIT
step1.body: We review your intake process, follow-up systems, and operational workflows to find exactly where clients are being lost.

step2.title: DIAGNOSE
step2.body: We deliver a written summary of what we found — specific gaps, missed opportunities, and a prioritized list of what to fix first.

step3.title: BUILD
step3.body: We design and build the AI systems identified in the diagnosis — intake flows, follow-up sequences, scheduling automation, or operational workflows.

step4.title: AUTOMATE
step4.body: We integrate the systems into your existing tools, train your team, and make sure everything runs without manual intervention.

step5.title: IMPROVE
step5.body: We monitor performance, measure results, and make adjustments. Systems that work should get better over time.

process.full_sub: A diagnostic-first process built for professional service businesses — transparent, practical, and focused on measurable results.

whyus.headline: We're not a software vendor. We're your implementation partner.

col1.title: Diagnostic First
col1.body: We don't sell you a system before we understand your problem. Every engagement starts with an audit — so the solution is specific to what you actually need, not what we want to sell.

col2.title: Bilingual, Puerto Rico-Rooted
col2.body: We serve the Puerto Rican business community in Puerto Rico and Orlando. We understand the market, the clients, and the culture. We work in English and Spanish.

col3.title: End-to-End Ownership
col3.body: We build it, deploy it, train your team, and stay with it. If something isn't working, we fix it. We own the outcome — not just the deliverable.

proof.metric: Manual reminder calls eliminated across every client we've automated.
proof.metric_sub: Replaced with automated SMS, WhatsApp, and email workflows.

case1.headline: A full factory operation — automated from order to delivery
case1.body: Roomy Organizers needed their entire workflow connected. We built an end-to-end system linking sales, production, inventory, and fulfillment — no more disconnected spreadsheets or manual handoffs between teams.

case2.headline: Client data in. Government filing out. Zero manual steps.
case2.body: For CPA firms, we built an AI-powered workflow where clients submit documents through a guided interface. The system validates, formats, and submits to government portals — eliminating re-entry errors and cutting processing time.

case3.headline: Your team stopped making reminder calls. Clients still show up.
case3.body: Across medical clinics, non-profit agencies, and pet resorts, we replaced manual phone trees with automated SMS and WhatsApp reminders coordinated with email. Teams manage everything from one dashboard.

cta.headline: Find out where you're losing clients.
cta.subheadline: The audit is free. The findings are yours to keep.
cta.note: No pitch. No commitment. Available in English and Spanish.

contact.sub: Tell us what you're dealing with. We'll tell you what's possible.

about.headline: We Build AI Systems for Professional Service Businesses
about.sub: ThunderHouse is an AI implementation agency that specializes in helping doctors, attorneys, and CPAs fix the gaps that cost them clients.
about.mission_body: We start with a diagnostic audit — not a sales pitch. We find where you're losing clients, explain it clearly, and then build the AI systems to fix it. We don't sell technology for technology's sake. We implement systems that solve specific, measurable business problems.
about.market_body: We serve the Puerto Rican business community in Puerto Rico and Orlando, Florida. We work in English and Spanish, and we understand the market, the culture, and the unique dynamics of building a professional service practice in this community.
